title: California
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in California

The California Consumer Assistance Program is run by the California Department of Managed Health Care and Department of Insurance. Staff can answer questions about health insurance regulations, rights, and responsibilities. They can help you file a complaint or appeal a health plan decision. Get consumer help with a problem or question.

Medicaid in California

You can apply for Medicaid in California by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in California

If your small business is located in California, you can use the Covered California website to learn more about offering your employees health coverage.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in California

If your employer offers SHOP health coverage in California, you should contact your employer or visit the Covered California website for more information.

Health Insurance Marketplace® in California

If you live in California, you'll use the Covered California website to enroll in health coverage.

CHIP in California

Healthy Families covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Healthy Families right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Healthy Families in California.
